series_metadata.series_description: The Self Insured Complaints – SI28 forms are filed against a self-insured employer. The Self Insured Complaints are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan the original document into UDS, verify the scanned image is readable, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 6 years, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
